---
title: "Chapter 1: Course Introduction"
---

# Introduction to Structural Equation Modeling

## Overview

This chapter presents the objectives and logistics of the course. It introduces Structural Equation Modeling (SEM) and provides a few examples. 


## Learning Objectives

After completing this chapter, you will be able to:

- Navigate the course content
- Explain what SEM is and why it is useful
- Identify the basic components of SEM models


## Lecture Slides

- [Introduction to SEM](slides/intro_sem.qmd)
